assets.name: wm-story
assets.description: Generate a West Monroe-style user story with acceptance criteria from a raw requirement or feature brief.

assets.name: wm-backlog
assets.description: Turn requirements or stories into a prioritized MVP backlog with sequencing and delivery guidance.

assets.name: wm-qa-plan
assets.description: Create a concise QA plan, scenario matrix, seed-data approach, and smoke-test checklist.

assets.name: wm-pr-review
assets.description: Review a change against West Monroe quality, security, testing, and client-delivery expectations.

assets.name: wm-adr
assets.description: Generate a West Monroe-style architecture decision record from the current decision context.

assets.name: wm-client-handoff
assets.description: Review a client-facing deliverable for readiness, professionalism, and West Monroe engagement standards.

assets.name: product-requirements-agent
assets.description: Convert a product brief into backlog-ready user stories, assumptions, out-of-scope items, and open questions.

assets.name: backlog-prioritization-agent
assets.description: Convert requirements into an MVP backlog with dependency-aware sequencing and delivery recommendations.

assets.name: full-stack-delivery-agent
assets.description: Implement a scoped feature with tests while following the existing codebase patterns.

assets.name: qa-validation-agent
assets.description: Validate requirements coverage, prepare seed data, and run smoke checks for a demo-ready increment.

assets.name: codebase-onboarding-agent
assets.description: Explore a codebase and produce an onboarding guide that gets a new engineer productive quickly.

assets.name: product-delivery-orchestrator
assets.description: Act as a PM-style orchestrator that coordinates requirements, backlog, implementation, and QA skills.
